parsed.summary: The changeset introduces significant modifications to foundational I/O modules (scripts/lib/glm-client.mjs and scripts/lib/git.mjs) without corresponding unit test files. While the core review logic has strong test parity, the absence of tests for the API client (a critical trust boundary) and Git utilities poses a risk of silent auth failures, unhandled network timeouts, and crashes on malformed git outputs.

findings.title: Missing test coverage for API client trust boundary
findings.body: The diff adds 160 lines to scripts/lib/glm-client.mjs, which handles model communication, authentication, and likely retry logic. No dedicated test file exists in the changeset. Trust boundaries require rigorous testing for 4xx/5xx errors, rate limiting, and malformed responses to prevent silent data corruption or stalled review pipelines.
findings.recommendation: Add a dedicated test file (e.g., tests/glm-client.test.mjs) to mock HTTP responses and assert behavior on network errors, authentication failures, and rate limits.

validation_signals.artifact: no stable anchor candidate in finding text

findings.title: Missing test coverage for Git utility edge cases
findings.body: The diff adds 85 lines to scripts/lib/git.mjs without a corresponding test file. Git operations are vulnerable to edge cases such as empty diffs, binary files, and detached HEADs. Unhandled exceptions here will crash the review pipeline.
findings.recommendation: Add a dedicated test file (e.g., tests/git.test.mjs) to mock child process execution and validate parsing of empty repositories, large diffs, and malformed SHAs.

validation_signals.artifact: no stable anchor candidate in finding text

next_steps: Request addition of unit tests for scripts/lib/glm-client.mjs before merging.
Request addition of unit tests for scripts/lib/git.mjs before merging.
